failure: A market-feature combination with fewer than 100 finite calibration observations raised ValueError for extreme_dwell and aborted the whole campaign.
corrective_action: Reject each unavailable market-feature structure explicitly at Stage 0 and allow all other frozen structures to continue.
CONTRE: Quantile feature values were read before the abort even though no economic outcome was computed; the revision therefore retains the exact candidate population and every frozen economic threshold.
